Acceptance checklist:

1. App renders on plain browser open (no build step).
2. Add todo via input + button or Enter.
3. Mark todo complete with visible completed style.
4. Delete todo item.
5. Persist list and completed state in localStorage.
6. README explains local run and feature checks.

Implementation quality expectations:
- semantic HTML (`main`, `form`, `ul`, `button`)
- no external JS dependencies
- defensive localStorage parse/write
- clear, small file structure (`index.html`, `styles.css`, `app.js`)
